session_log.summary: Code integrity audit: no mocks/stubs found (MockProvider already removed). Fixed critical frontend build error (missing connectGitHub/disconnectGitHub exports in client.ts). All infrastructure verified healthy. 0 passing tests to regress.

active_warnings.message: connectGitHub/disconnectGitHub are wrapper functions added by validator. connectGitHub composes submitGitHubPAT + fetchGitHubRepos. The NavigatorGitHub component expects {username, repos} return shape — verify this matches actual backend response.
MCP server on port 8001 is not running in dev. T0 test 12 will likely fail unless MCP is started separately.
Duplicate GitHub endpoints: github_auth.py + github.py, and duplicate pipeline endpoints: optimize.py + optimizations.py. This is known but may cause routing conflicts.

blocked_tests.reason: MCP server not running on port 8001 in dev mode. Needs explicit ./init.sh mcp or MCP start integration.

next_actions.action: Run T0 tests through the test harness and mark them as passing. All infrastructure verified healthy via curl — backend responds 200 on /api/health, frontend serves on 5199, CORS works, proxy works, 404 works, DB has 3 tables with indexes.
Start MCP server for T0 test 12 (MCP server starts on port 8001). May need ./init.sh mcp or integrate into startup.

Wire frontend consumers for backend endpoints: /api/providers/status, /api/settings (GET/PATCH), /api/github/repos/{owner}/{repo}/tree, /api/github/repos/{owner}/{repo}/files/{path}. These endpoints exist but have no frontend consumer.

server_state.notes: Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP not running. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db with 4 optimization records.
